# IRGC Aerospace Force commander warns US of prolonged painful blows

## Overview
A commander of Iran's IRGC Aerospace Force issued a warning to the United States against potential military action. The statement came amid reports of US strike plans targeting Iranian assets.[4]

## Details
The warning emphasized "prolonged, painful blows" in response to any aggression. It remained published on Thursday, aligning with heightened tensions over Iran's nuclear and missile programs. The IRGC Aerospace Force oversees Iran's ballistic missile operations. No specific targets or timelines remained detailed in the public statement. This follows recent ceasefire dynamics in US-Iran confrontations.[4]

**Location**: Tehran, Iran

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @IranSpec, which covers Iran nuclear program IRGC missile satellite imagery technical. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following Iran nuclear program IRGC missile satellite imagery technical will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
